title: Hands of Fate both players may look at top 5; you rearrange them on top of opponent deck

card.rawText: You and your opponent may look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck. You may rearrange them in any order. Once finished, place them on the top of their deck.

effect.value: Look at and rearrange in any order
